settings.featured_tags_help: Selected categories appear highlighted with a star badge on the homepage and categories page.
settings.showcase_enabled_help: Show a showcase slider on the homepage with discussions from selected tags.
settings.showcase_tag_help: Discussions from these tags appear in the showcase slider on the homepage.
settings.showcase_heading_help: Custom title for the showcase section. Leave empty to use default.
settings.showcase_count_help: Display 1 to 5 discussion cards in the showcase section.
settings.showcase_image_style_help: Choose between compact or full-height image display.
settings.section_titles_help: Override the homepage section titles. Leave any field empty to use the language pack default.
settings.show_online_users_help: Display the number of currently online users.
settings.show_online_count_help: Show the "X online" label next to the online user avatars.
settings.custom_auth_modal_label: Use custom login / sign up modal
settings.custom_auth_modal_help: Show the custom side-panel design on the Log In, Sign Up and Forgot Password modals. Turn off to use Flarum's default modal.
settings.auth_image_help: Background image shown in the right panel of the login, sign up, and forgot password modals.
settings.banner_image_help: Upload the hero banner image displayed at the top of the forum.
settings.show_auth_buttons_label: Show Login / Sign Up buttons in header for guests
settings.show_auth_buttons_help: Display Log In and Sign Up pill buttons in the header secondary nav for guests.
settings.show_guest_cta_help: Display a call-to-action message for guests.
settings.hero_image_position_help: CSS background-position value, e.g. 'center top' or '50% 20%'.
settings.custom_hero_enabled_help: Replace the default hero content (icon, title, description, Login/Sign Up buttons) with your own HTML. The hero banner wrapper, background image and overlay stay intact. Shown to guests only — same as the default hero.
settings.custom_hero_html_help: HTML injected inside the hero banner overlay (replaces .AvocadoHome-heroBannerContent). Inline '<style>' tags are supported.
settings.search_v1_help: Show the inline search dropdown instead of the V2 modal.
settings.show_share_help: Add a Share action button to each post.
settings.show_action_icons_label: Show icons on Like and Reply buttons
settings.show_action_icons_help: Display Font Awesome icons on the Like and Reply action buttons.
settings.fixed_avatar_effect_help: Keep the post avatar sticky while reading long comments on desktop.
settings.threads_style_help: Display the OP post as a card and indent replies with a left border, like the Threads app.
settings.hero_decoration_icon_label: Show secondary tag icon on discussion hero
settings.hero_decoration_icon_help: Display the secondary tag icon as a large decorative element on the right side of the discussion header.
settings.hero_decoration_icon_opacity_help: Set the opacity of the decoration icon as a percentage. 100 = fully opaque, 0 = invisible.
settings.hero_decoration_icon_count_help: 1 icon uses the first child tag. 2 icons also shows the second child tag icon, offset to the left.
settings.hero_deco_divider_help: Display an icon in the gap between the two decoration icons (e.g. a "vs" symbol for sport sites).
settings.hero_deco_divider_icon_help: Font Awesome class for the divider icon, e.g. "fas fa-times" or "fas fa-circle".
settings.colored_enabled_help: Apply the active tag or discussion color to primary buttons, links, and other UI accents across the forum.
settings.colored_border_style_help: Add a colored border to discussion cards using the primary tag color.
settings.show_post_cta_label: Show Join CTA after first post for guests
settings.show_post_cta_help: Display a Log In / Sign Up card after the first post in a discussion, visible only to guests.
settings.post_cta_position_help: Insert the CTA banner between this post number and the next one.
settings.logo_svg_help: Upload a custom SVG logo for your forum.
settings.logo_enabled_help: Display the custom logo in the header.
settings.custom_loading_spinner_help: Replace the default text loading indicator with an animated SVG spinner.
settings.spinner_custom_code_help: Paste any SVG or HTML to use as the loading spinner.
settings.hide_links_for_guests_help: Prevent guests from following links in posts. Clicking a link shows a Login / Sign Up prompt instead.
settings.custom_default_avatar_help: Upload a custom default avatar image for users without an avatar.
settings.hero_image_tags_label: Tags that ask for a hero image
settings.hero_image_tags_help: When the user adds one of these tags to a new discussion, the composer reveals an optional image upload field. The uploaded image is shown as the discussion header background and as the first image in the homepage showcase.
settings.team_enabled_help: Show a /team page listing members of the selected groups.
settings.team_desc_placeholder: Meet the people behind the community.
settings.team_groups_help: Members of the selected groups will appear on the Team page.

footer_settings.footer_company_description_placeholder: Brief description about your company or forum...
footer_settings.footer_links_help_json: Configure the footer link columns in JSON format. Each column should have a title and a list of links with label and url.
footer_settings.footer_social_help_json: Configure social media links in JSON format. Use keys: facebook, twitter, linkedin, instagram, youtube.

post_cta.text: Like what you see? Join the discussion!

search.title: Search
search.enter_search_term: Enter a search term to find users.

discussion.hero_image_remove_confirm: Remove the hero image from this discussion?

home.composer_hero_image_upload_failed: Could not upload the hero image. You can try again on the discussion page.
home.start_discussion: Tell everyone what are you working on...

bookmarks.title: Saved
bookmarks.empty: You haven't saved any discussions yet.
bookmarks.guest_prompt: Log in to save discussions and find them here later.
bookmarks.toggle_error: Could not update your saved list. Please try again.

tags.title: Categories
tags.empty: No discussions in this category yet.
